author: maintainer-agent

patch.value: Scorecard CII-Best-Practices (0→≥5): earn the OpenSSF Best Practices badge at passing level

Project registered at bestpractices.dev (free), questionnaire completed to PASSING level (agent drafts all answers as a note here; maintainer submits), badge added to README; Scorecard CII-Best-Practices scores ≥5 (passing=5, silver=7, gold=10)

message: Scorecard: no OpenSSF best-practices badge. Registration is HUMAN-GATED (GitHub login at bestpractices.dev) but the ~60-question passing questionnaire can be pre-drafted by an agent from repo evidence (tests, CI gates, SECURITY.md, signed releases, docs). Most criteria already hold thanks to the 100% coverage gate + security workflows.
